notes: Intentionally boxy dashboard: framed graph, stacked side cards, paragraph-heavy explanation.
Open graph-paper stage with attached labels, ghost path, compact floating inspector, and state-changing controls.
Intentionally generic AI output: hero, ladder metaphor, cards, and detached explanations.
Artifact-centered rubric lens: annotated excerpt, criterion overlays, evidence trace, and before/after toggle.
Generic step-card OAuth explanation with detached security notes.
Request trace with tokens and redirects attached directly to the flow.
Formula and definition card explainer with a small decorative graph.
Curve-first explanation with tangent, step arrow, and visible point update.
Generic React concept cards with a decorative code snippet and detached explanation column.
Code-and-trace workspace showing setState, render, commit, effect, and visible output change.
Generic photosynthesis card explainer with a small decorative chloroplast diagram.
Chloroplast cross-section with light, water, electron, ATP/NADPH, CO2, and sugar flows attached to structure.
Generic incident postmortem cards with a small decorative timeline strip.
Incident timeline with scaled time axis, degraded interval, metric traces, and recovery-state toggle.
